requirements.R1: leads_to(tree, 'receive customer data', 'conduct risk assessment') and activity_receives(tree, 'receive customer data', 'customerData')
requirements.R2: executed_by(tree, 'provide brochures', 'customer advisor') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'wphgCustomerInformation') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'basicInformationSecuritiesCapitalInvestment')
requirements.R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send documents') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'customerLegitimation') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'accountDocuments')
requirements.R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetence >= "level C"', 'conduct investment advice')
requirements.R5: executed_by(tree, 'identify customer', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'legitimate customer', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check suspected money laundering', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
requirements.R6: leads_to(tree, 'resolve suspected money laundering', 'conclude custody account contract') and executed_by(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'customer advisor')

requirements.R1: precedence(tree, 'assess individual risk', 'receive customer data') and activity_receives(tree, 'receive customer data', 'customerData')

requirements.R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send documents to market support') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents to market support', 'customerLegitimation') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents to market support', 'accountDocuments')
requirements.R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetence >= "level C"', 'conduct investment advice')
requirements.R5: executed_by(tree, 'identify and legitimate customer', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check suspected money laundering', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
requirements.R6: precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve suspected money laundering')

requirements.R2: executed_by(tree, 'provide brochures', 'customer advisor') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'wphgCustomerInformation') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'basicInformationSecuritiesAndCapitalInvestment')
requirements.R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody contract', 'send documents') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'customerLegitimation') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'accountDocuments')
requirements.R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetence >= "level C"', 'conduct investment advice')
requirements.R5: executed_by(tree, 'legitimate customer', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check money laundering suspicion', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
requirements.R6: leads_to(tree, 'resolve money laundering suspicion', 'conclude custody contract') and executed_by(tree, 'conclude custody contract', 'customer advisor')

requirements.R1: precedence(tree, 'perform individual risk assessment', 'receive data') and activity_receives(tree, 'receive data', 'customerData')
requirements.R2: exists(tree, 'provide brochures') and executed_by(tree, 'provide brochures', 'customer advisor') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'wphgCustomerInformation') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'basicInformationSecuritiesAndCapitalInvestment')
requirements.R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send documents') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'customerLegitimation') and activity_sends(tree, 'send documents', 'accountDocuments')
requirements.R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetence >= "Level C"', 'conduct investment advice')
requirements.R5: executed_by(tree, 'identify and legitimate customer', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'isMoneyLaunderingSuspected == true', 'check money laundering suspicion') and executed_by(tree, 'check money laundering suspicion', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
requirements.R6: executed_by(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'customer advisor') and precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve money laundering suspicion')
requirements.R7: leads_to(tree, 'contact customer', 'update customer information') and activity_sends(tree, 'update customer information', 'customerInformation')
